findings.problem: The document now says closure must require the exact current mechanical-gate command, but the command it specifies does not exactly match the active shared-module contract. The plan uses a repository-relative path, while the authoritative contract currently requires the absolute path command.
findings.evidence: `docs/review-flow/transition-resolver-execution-plan.md:648-651` requires the "exact current command" `python3 openspec/schemas/modules/review-loop/bin/review_loop_guard.py --run-dir <review-run-dir>`. The authoritative module contract in `openspec/schemas/modules/review-loop/VERIFY-IMPLEMENTATION.md:180-184` currently requires `python3 /home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/openspec/schemas/modules/review-loop/bin/review_loop_guard.py --run-dir <review-run-dir>`.
findings.recommendation: Either change the execution plan to reference the exact command string currently required by `VERIFY-IMPLEMENTATION.md`, or explicitly defer any path normalization until the shared module contract is updated first.
